headline: Estée Lauder Acquires Remaining Interest In India's Forest Essentials
summary: EL stock rises as Estée Lauder strengthens its Indian luxury brand portfolio with Forest Essentials, supporting sustainable growth and premium positioning.

raw.headline: Estée Lauder Acquires Remaining Interest In India's Forest Essentials
raw.summary: EL stock rises as Estée Lauder strengthens its Indian luxury brand portfolio with Forest Essentials, supporting sustainable growth and premium positioning.

headline: The Estée Lauder Companies and Forest Essentials to Enter a New Chapter in Their Long-Term Partnership
summary: NEW YORK & NEW DELHI, March 05, 2026--The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) announced today that it has entered into an agreement, subject to regulatory approvals, to acquire the remaining interests in Forest Essentials, the Indian beauty brand grounded in the science of modern Luxurious Ayurveda. Building on a trusted 18-year partnership, this milestone celebrates The Estée Lauder Companies’ long-term commitment to nurturing and growing this extraordinary Indian brand and to expanding its

headline: Estée Lauder To Acquire Remaining Shares In Indian Luxury Ayurveda Brand Forest Essentials, Deal Expected To Close H2 2026; Terms Not Disclosed
summary: Following Minority Investment, The Estée Lauder Companies to Acquire Remaining Shares in Forest EssentialsMira Kulkarni to Continue to Oversee Brand with Headquarters Remaining in New DelhiThe Estée Lauder Companies
